purpose: Deterministic guardrail compiler fixture covering document completeness, PDF file rules, missing user facts, and explicit-confirmation gates for a Single PDF Process permit-preparation case.

documents.title: Single PDF Process guidance
documents.fixture_note: Curated public-guidance excerpt for deterministic tests. This is not raw crawl output.

sections.heading: File rules
sections.text: Drawing plans are submitted as one searchable PDF. Applications, calculations, and supporting documents are submitted as separate PDF files.

sections.heading: Prepare before submitting
sections.text: Required application forms, drawing plans, and supporting documents must be prepared before submitting the request in DevHub.

documents.title: Apply for permits online using Development Hub PDX
documents.fixture_note: Curated public-guidance excerpt for deterministic action-gate tests. This is not a DevHub session recording.

sections.heading: Review before submitting
sections.text: The applicant is responsible for reviewing application information and required documents before final submission. Automation must stop before submitting an application unless the user explicitly confirms that exact action.

expected_requirements.subject: applicant
expected_requirements.natural_language: The applicant must provide the required application form as a separate PDF before submitting a DevHub permit request.

evidence.excerpt: Applications, calculations, and supporting documents are submitted as separate PDF files.

expected_requirements.subject: applicant
expected_requirements.object: drawing plans as one searchable PDF
expected_requirements.natural_language: For projects using the Single PDF Process, drawing plans must be provided as one searchable PDF.

evidence.excerpt: Drawing plans are submitted as one searchable PDF.

expected_requirements.subject: applicant
expected_requirements.natural_language: The project property address must be known before a permit request can be prepared for review.

evidence.excerpt: The applicant is responsible for reviewing application information and required documents before final submission.

expected_requirements.subject: applicant
expected_requirements.natural_language: The project property identifier is treated as a missing user fact until supplied or resolved from a permitted public property lookup.

evidence.excerpt: The applicant is responsible for reviewing application information and required documents before final submission.

expected_requirements.subject: agent
expected_requirements.natural_language: Automation must stop before submitting an application unless the user explicitly confirms that exact action.

validation_expectations: Every expected requirement compiles into a guardrail with support-map evidence.
Document completeness checks identify missing required PDFs without reading private document stores.
PDF file-rule checks require application/pdf MIME type, .pdf file extension, and searchable drawing-plan text when specified by the fixture.
Missing user facts are reported as missing rather than guessed from public guidance.
Final DevHub submission remains blocked until explicit confirmation for that exact action is present.
